docs.title: Welcome
docs.text:
This is my personal space on the web — a place where I document what I learn, share what I build, and reflect on what I experience.

Three threads run through this site:

Thread What you'll find Tech Notes Programming languages, frameworks, tools, debugging stories, system design Project Showcases Personal projects, architecture decisions, demos, open-source contributions Life Reflections Thoughts on learning, reading notes, career insights, random musings

docs.title: Site Info
docs.text: Item Details Built with MkDocs + Material for MkDocs Hosted on GitHub Pages

docs.title: Who I Am
docs.text: I'm WinnowPlus, a developer living in China. I build software, write code, and occasionally step back to think about what it all means.

docs.title: What I Do
docs.text: Area Details Development Full-stack, backend systems, API design Tools Linux, Docker, Git, CI/CD, cloud services Languages Java, Lua Interests Open source, knowledge management, technical writing, lifelong learning

docs.title: Why This Site
docs.text:
I created this site for three reasons:

  1. To remember — documenting solutions so I don't solve the same problem twice
  2. To share — putting knowledge out there in case it helps someone else
  3. To reflect — writing down thoughts to clarify my own thinking
